title: vigna sinensis subsp. sesquipedalis
intro: Vigna sinensis subsp. sesquipedalis, also known as the yardlong bean or Chinese long bean, is a type of legume plant native to Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve blood circulation, which contributes to its use in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever and diarrhea. The health benefits of consuming yardlong beans include their high content of fiber, protein, and various essential vitamins and minerals, making them a nutritious addition to a balanced diet. Yardlong beans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried supplements, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy digestion.
